text: Throughout the app, allow for value and cost input "k" unit for 1000. When displaying, if 3 last digits are 0 => replace with "k". And if >= 9500 round to thousands and add ~ in front: 9700 => ~10k
description: 3 zeros has prevalance => 10000 becomes "10k" with out the leading ~

status.comment: Implemented k-unit formatting for value/cost inputs and displays in GraphSidePanel. Users can now input values like '10k' for 10000, and display shows smart formatting (10000→'10k', 9700→'~10k').
